message:
fix(writing): refine Barra and Hoeffding article visualizations

Additional polish pass on the Barra Factor Model and Hoeffding's D
articles addressing edge cases and improving visual consistency.

Barra Factor Model:
- Improved FactorCorrelationMatrix color scaling
- Fixed PodSimulator animation jank on rapid state changes
- Better legend placement for mobile viewports

Hoeffding's D:
- Refined CorrelationExplorer data point rendering
- Fixed RankingVisualizer step indicator positioning
- Improved article text flow around visualizations
- Better formula wrapping in narrow viewports

These changes were identified during live testing of the new
article pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
